data.title: Michael Dell Joins Trump, Elon Musk For High-Stakes AI Talks As Dell Eyes $15 Billion In Server Business
data.description: Michael Dell, CEO of Dell, announced a productive meeting with Trump, Tesla CEO Elon Musk and other technology executives.

data.title: China's Viral AI Agent Manus Taps Alibaba's Qwen For Local Expansion: What You Need To Know
data.description: China's Manus AI, a viral autonomous agent developed by Tencent-backed startup The Butterfly Effect, is partnering with Alibaba's Qwen team to create a localized version as it gains global attention and draws comparisons to DeepSeek.

data.title: Pepe Leads Memecoin Rebound WIth 11% Rally, But Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Not That Far Behind
data.description: Memecoins bounced back with a spirited rally Tuesday following Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) upward advances.

data.title: Palantir Calls For 'Software-First Approach' As Pentagon Spends Under 1% On Modern Warfare
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. Senior Counselor Samantha Clark has urged the Pentagon to embrace commercial software solutions or risk lagging behind global adversaries in an increasingly data-driven battlefield.

data.title: Melania Trump's Official Memecoin, Worth Over $13 Billion Barely Two Months Ago, Is Now Valued At $367 Million
data.description: Official Melania (CRYPTO: MELANIA) failed to reverse its downsides on Tuesday, even as the broader meme coin market staged a strong recovery.
